items.title: At least 19 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
items.summary: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.

items.title: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
items.summary: A volunteer diver has described shaking as he filmed his encounter with an endangered Great White shark between Tunisia and Sicily.

items.title: Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure
items.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan's Civil Contract Party secures nearly 50% of the vote, comfortably beating the other contenders.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 名古屋知名購物中心出事  多人同時「眼睛刺痛、瘋狂咳嗽」

items.title: 與伊朗互轟衝突擴大！以軍預告：戰鬥將持續數天
items.summary: 以色列與伊朗8日爆發新一波相互空襲，雙方出動飛彈與戰機互轟。對此，以色列國防軍（IDF）首度公開作戰預期，證實戰事不會在單次空襲後結束，軍方已做好準備，預期對伊朗的戰鬥行動將持...…

items.title: 大罵NBC主播不誠實、愚蠢   川普專訪中拔麥憤離席
items.summary: 美國總統川普接受國家廣播公司（NBC）節目專訪時，雖耐著性子回答關於伊朗戰爭的尖銳提問，還忍受雷電交加等天氣干擾，但在主持人問及其選舉舞弊言論時，川普一怒之下憤而離席。  法新社報導，川...…
